raw.subject: Your Wilmington page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I've been enjoying the photos of your kitchen staff in action – it's great to see the team that keeps Truck's Chicken 'n Fish running so smoothly.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on bookings and calls from customers who prefer to plan ahead.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea that pulls from the photos and posts you share on Facebook – it includes a hero section highlighting your famous Fried Chicken and Mac n Cheese, as well as a hours block and a photo gallery showing off your outdoor seating and in-store pickup options.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/truck-s-chicken-n-fish-wilmington

A simple website like this one would be a straightforward project to build, with a flat fee for local businesses like yours. If you're interested in learning more, I'd love to discuss further – feel free to reply or give me a quick call to chat details.
